title: prunus × media
intro: Prunus × media, also known as the Chinese cherry or Japanese cherry, is a hybrid plant that combines the Prunus avium and Prunus mume species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus × media include reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
